title: Nigeria’s Inflation Rate Hits 33.95% in May, Food and Transport Prices Soar - FinancialEDGE
description: Nigerians are finding it more difficult to feed themselves, as food inflation rose to 40.66 per cent in May, This was as the cost of food rose by 61 per cent from 25.25 per cent in June 2023 to 40.66 per cent in May 2024, highlighting a steady rise in the cost of living. This
